title: Reflections During a Power Outage
content: When the electricity suddenly disappeared across the neighborhood, Sophia instinctively reached for her phone before realizing the battery was nearly dead as well. Without internet, television, or bright artificial light filling the apartment, the evening became unexpectedly quiet. She lit several candles and sat near the window watching dark buildings across the street. For the first time in months, there was nothing demanding her attention. No notifications, emails, or endless information competing for space inside her mind. The silence initially felt uncomfortable, but gradually it became peaceful instead. Sitting alone in the dim apartment, Sophia reflected on how rarely modern life allowed people to simply pause without distractions.
